name: Mojtaba Khamenei
summary: Day 70 of operational silence. **A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 9 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE** since Pezeshkian's May 7 reported meeting. **On May 13, a portrait of Mojtaba Khamenei was held during Iran's national football team's farewell ceremony ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup (channelstv primary observational)** — a **PORTRAIT**, NOT the Supreme Leader himself. **This is the institutional substitute for personal appearance** — a regime functioning around an absent center, willing to physically display imagery of Mojtaba in public space while withholding any actual appearance. The CNN April 21 framing 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen — that might be helping the regime to survive' continues to hold structurally. The IRGC drill's invocation of late Ali Khamenei rather than supposedly-active Mojtaba (closed yesterday Day 5/5) remains the institutional tell. Pezeshkian's May 7 first-person claim remains the only senior-official-witnessed contact. **Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio'** UNTRIPPED — institutional command without visible person remains stable equilibrium since Feb 28. **Day 70 of operational silence + portrait at football send-off = the regime is deliberately deploying photographic substitutes rather than re-emerging the actual person.** PRIOR (May 15): **A6 MOJTABA KHAMENEI DAY 8 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE** post May 7 Pezeshkian meeting; no video, audio, or appearance since the May 7 Pezeshkian-meeting statement. **Today the IRGC's 'Martyred Commander' drill ended with codename 'Labbayk Ya Khamenei' — invoking the deceased Ali rather than the supposedly-active Mojtaba.** The drill's nomenclature leaning on Ali rather than Mojtaba is the institutional pattern of regime functioning around an absent center. **No Iranian state-media outlet (IRNA, Tasnim, Mehr, Press TV, Islam Times, Pars Today) has carried any direct Mojtaba statement, image, or recording May 8-15.** CNN's April 21 piece 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen' remains the cleanest English-language framing, with explicit mention of AI-generated videos of Khamenei being used by the regime, fueling speculation that he is incapacitated or abroad. The institutional pattern — IRGC drill nomenclature leaning on Ali rather than Mojtaba, Pezeshkian as the visible civilian face, Araghchi as the visible foreign-policy face, Wang Yi pressing for ceasefire May 6 with the comprehensive-strategic-partnership framing, and now Akraminia (Artesh) speaking on military readiness — is a regime functioning around an absent center. Sadjadpour's 'regime decapitated at the senior level' framing remains the cleanest read; Vali Nasr's 'time on Iran's side' thesis remains operative. No new public appearance, no audio, no video. **A12 STRUCTURAL SIGNAL: The IRGC's 5-day Tehran combat exercise launched May 12-13 was named 'Martyred Commander' / 'Labbayk Ya Khamenei' — invoking the LATE Ali Khamenei (Mojtaba's father, whose death was confirmed in March 2026), NOT Mojtaba.** When the IRGC explicitly invokes the deceased Khamenei rather than the supposedly-active new Supreme Leader, it suggests the institutional imagery is leaning on Ali's legacy because Mojtaba's visible authority is constrained. **This is the cleanest single new institutional signal in cycle that Mojtaba's authority is structurally limited.** Sadjadpour's 'regime decapitated at the senior level' framing remains the cleanest read; Vali Nasr's 'time on Iran's side' thesis remains operative. CNN April 21 long read + TIME's 'Iran's Supreme Leader No Longer Reigns Supreme' (April 21) remain the institutional analytic backdrop. Mehr News + Press TV + Tasnim + Islam Times all on the Martyred Commander codename — none of them on Mojtaba. Absence-of-appearance confirmed across IRNA / Tasnim / Press TV / Pars Today. PRIOR (May 13): Conflicting reports persist: NYT (citing four Iranian officials) says Mojtaba sustained serious injuries — multiple surgeries on legs and arms, difficulty speaking due to severe facial and lip burns. An aide rebuts with 'in perfect health... only a fracture behind his ear, slightly injured knee and back.' The National (Abu Dhabi) coverage tilted toward the injury-narrative read on May 10. CNN's April 21 'the regime's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen — that might be helping the regime survive' frame is now operational reality at 8+ weeks. **Institutional command without visible person remains the stable equilibrium that has carried the regime since February 28; the trigger (video/audio appearance) HAS NOT FIRED.** This is the operative read: Mojtaba's command is institutional, not visible. Iran tone HARDENING across IRNA/Tasnim/Parliament (Rezaei 90% rhetoric); Mohammadi (Deputy Labour Minister) publicly admitted >1 million direct job losses + 2 million unemployment-impacted — domestic economic damage now publicly quantified by Tehran while command remains absent. ORIGINAL CONTEXT (May 12): **PEZESHKIAN-MOJTABA 2.5-HOUR MEETING CLAIM IS NOW DAY 4 WITHOUT IRANIAN STATE-MEDIA CORROBORATION (no video, no audio, no photo, no readout, no location, no participant list).** **NETANYAHU CBS 60 MINUTES AIRED MAY 11: 'I BELIEVE [MOJTABA] IS ALIVE BUT HE'S HOLED UP IN SOME BUNKER' — independently consistent with US intel community May 8 assessment (CNN/KVIA) that Mojtaba is 'shaping strategy' but 'out of public view.' Convergence of US + Israeli intel framing on 'alive but in bunker' AGAINST the absence of any Iranian state-media physical evidence is the operative read: Mojtaba's command is institutional, not visible.** Pezeshkian's May 12 'resistance and protecting honor' speech at Ministry of Industry made no fresh reference to the alleged meeting. The continued vacuum reinforces the Stage-2 managed-leadership-vacuum read. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 65. The Pezeshkian claim and US-intel + Israeli-intel 'alive but in bunker' lines operate against each other in the public information space, with the US-intel + Israeli-intel reading now CONVERGENT (single source originally, now multi-source). Mokhber 'atomic-bomb' Hormuz doctrine remains the most recent leadership-adjacent articulation. Iran's source tone is hardening (Tasnim's Velayati Trump-Xi summit-timed jab; IRNA's Army spokesperson Akraminia 'surprising options' warning) but no public statement attributed to Mojtaba in any form. No date, location, participant list, readout, video, photo, or audio. The information vacuum is widening, not narrowing. CNN/KVIA US-intel assessment that Mojtaba is 'alive and shaping strategy' but 'out of public view' unchanged. **This is itself an intelligence signal:** if a credible meeting had occurred, the regime would by now have produced video or at minimum a photograph for domestic legitimacy — particularly during a week when the supreme leader's authority over a potential MOU is the central question. The continued vacuum reinforces the Stage-2 managed-leadership-vacuum read. **Mokhber 'atomic-bomb' Hormuz doctrine speech remains the most recent leadership-adjacent articulation** — no new public statement by Mokhber today; no Iranian state media has produced a follow-up speech, retraction, or amplification in past 24 hours. The institutional intelligence value of Mokhber's speech is durable. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 63. CNN sources continue to report fractured foot, bruised eye, minor lacerations from Feb 28 strike. The Pezeshkian claim and US-intel 'out of public view' line operate against each other in the public information space. Pezeshkian provided NO date, NO location, NO list of other participants, NO substantive readout, NO video/audio/photo. Read as intelligence: regime is in second stage of a managed-leadership-vacuum playbook — Stage 1 (March-April) was written-only statements via state TV; Stage 2 (May) is named senior officials publicly attesting to private contact with the supreme leader without producing evidence. **MOKHBER 'ATOMIC-BOMB' SPEECH REINFORCES THE THESIS:** Mohammad Mokhber (described in Pakistani/Iranian outlets as adviser to Mojtaba specifically) publicly delivered the maximalist Hormuz-control doctrine May 8 — leadership-adjacent voices speaking publicly while Mojtaba himself remains absent. Yesterday's TIME April 21 disclosure of AI-generated videos remains structural reason MOU signature within one week is implausible — leadership-decision authority cannot be exercised through proxies on a deal of this scale. The Pezeshkian claim therefore reads as a credibility-borrowing move INSIDE the negotiation as much as a domestic-narrative move. The IRGC-vs-civilian-government factional split is not closed by an unverifiable face-to-face claim, particularly one made in the same week IRGC publicly attacked three US destroyers mid-MOU window. Iran International (diaspora) had run Pezeshkian-IRGC factional-divergence framing this week. Trigger 'Mojtaba appears on video/audio' UNTRIPPED Day 62. CNN sources continue to report fractured foot, bruised eye, minor lacerations from Feb 28 strike.
